title: oberna lacera
intro: Oberna lacera, also known as the African violet or African violet vine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oberna lacera include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Oberna lacera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
